title: lavandula spica var. angustifolia
intro: Lavandula spica var. angustifolia, also known as true lavender, is a subspecies of the lavender plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Lavandula spica var. angustifolia include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and stress, as well as its ability to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality. Lavandula spica var. angustifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
